name: Pranil Belge
title: Software Developer (QA & Testing Focus)
summary: Motivated final-year Computer Engineering student (graduating June 2026) with hands-on experience in Python, SQL, and structured analytical workflows. Familiar with software testing concepts, defect tracking, documentation, and QA processes. Built 8+ software and data projects demonstrating attention to detail, structured reporting, and methodical problem-solving. Eager to contribute to testing and validation of medical instruments and software systems as an Apprentice Software Engineer at Alcon.

meta.title: Pranil Belge | Software Developer Portfolio
meta.description: Explore Software Developer and QA/Testing projects, certifications, and experience of Pranil Belge, specializing in Python, manual/automated testing, and SQL.

projects.title: Software Test Case Management Simulator
projects.description: A Python-based tool to simulate test case management workflows: creating, executing, logging, and tracking test cases with pass/fail/blocked status across functional modules.
achievements: Designed and implemented a Python-based tool to simulate test case management workflows: creating, executing, logging, and tracking test cases with pass/fail/blocked status.
Built a defect log generator that auto-assigns severity (Critical/Major/Minor) based on failure patterns and exports structured reports to Excel.
Demonstrated understanding of test plan structure, traceability, and documentation discipline required in software validation processes.
projects.problemSolved: Simulates manual and structured defect tracking workflows in a programmatic environment for validation.
projects.learnings: Developed key validation principles, mock reporting engines, and structured CSV reporting logic.

projects.title: Healthcare Risk Stratification System
projects.description: A Python-based ML classification system handling 5,000+ patient records with automated data validation and anomaly detection.
achievements: Developed a Python-based ML classification system handling 5,000+ patient records with automated data validation and anomaly detection.
Applied feature engineering and ROC-AUC evaluation to stratify patients into risk tiers, reducing manual checking through automation.
projects.problemSolved: Hospitals require automated classification systems to allocate preventive care resources efficiently.
projects.learnings: Advanced skills in imbalanced data handling, feature scaling, and performance metrics evaluation.

projects.title: Google Ads Campaign Diagnostic & Performance Analysis
projects.description: An end-to-end data pipeline ingesting, cleaning, and evaluating Google Ads performance metrics (CTR, CPC, ROAS) and detecting budget leakage.
achievements: Built an end-to-end data pipeline ingesting, cleaning, and evaluating Google Ads performance metrics.
Automated anomaly detection and scoring logic; wrote optimised SQL queries for large dataset extraction and aggregation.
projects.problemSolved: Detects marketing spend inefficiencies and anomalies dynamically across campaigns.
projects.learnings: Mastered complex SQL aggregations, time-series anomaly detection, and KPI math.

projects.title: Election Guide AI
projects.description: A full-stack civic-tech web application featuring an AI chatbot, voting eligibility checker, and election timeline tracker.
achievements: Built a full-stack civic-tech web application featuring an AI chatbot (LLM API integration), voting eligibility checker, and election timeline tracker.
Deployed live as part of Hack2Skill BuildWithAI hackathon; received developer community engagement on LinkedIn.
projects.problemSolved: Voters struggle to access dynamic, non-partisan voting guidelines and timeline reminders.
projects.learnings: Learned model deployment, API integrations, and low-latency state updates in React.

projects.title: Python EDA & Data Wrangling Pipeline
projects.description: A modular, reusable EDA pipeline automating null detection, outlier analysis, correlation heatmaps, and distribution profiling.
achievements: Built a modular, reusable EDA pipeline automating null detection, outlier analysis, correlation heatmaps, and distribution profiling.
Supports rapid, accurate data validation relevant to test data management.
projects.problemSolved: Automates repetitive exploratory data analysis and data validation workflows.
projects.learnings: Acquired deep understanding of outlier handling, statistical distribution metrics, and data validation structures.

experience.company: Tata – Data Analytics Job Simulation (via Forage)
experience.description: Investigated dataset anomalies, logged inconsistencies, and produced structured evidence-backed reports with clear escalation paths.
achievements: Investigated dataset anomalies and logged inconsistencies to mirror defect identification QA workflows.
Built Power BI dashboards with DAX-calculated measures to monitor KPIs.
Applied Python scripting for data transformation, validation, and structured documentation.

experience.company: Deloitte – Data Analytics Consulting Simulation (via Forage)
experience.description: Performed systematic exploratory data analysis and anomaly detection on client datasets using Python.
achievements: Performed EDA and anomaly detection using Python, analogous to test observation logging.
Delivered Excel-based analytical reports to stakeholders, showing clear communication of technical findings.

Google AI-ML Virtual Internship & Altair Data Science Internship
